name: Cash America Pawn
description_short: Lake Worth, TX Cash America Pawn at 6004 Lake Worth Blvd offers pawn loans, buying, and selling for the community.
description_long:
Cash America Pawn in Lake Worth, TX is located at 6004 Lake Worth Blvd, serving the Lake Worth community as a standalone pawn shop. The Lake Worth location operates Monday through Friday from 9AM to 7PM, and Saturday from 9AM to 6PM, providing convenient hours for residents to visit and access pawn services.

At this Lake Worth pawn shop, you can secure fast cash loans using personal items as collateral, buy quality pre-owned merchandise, or sell items you no longer need. The team at 6004 Lake Worth Blvd is ready to help with your pawn transaction and can be reached at +1 817-237-7277 for questions or to discuss loan options before visiting.

For Lake Worth residents looking for quick cash without the hassle of traditional loans, this location offers a practical solution. Bring a valid ID and the item you wish to pawn or sell, and the knowledgeable staff will evaluate your items fairly. Cash America Pawn has built a reputation for straightforward transactions and community trust.
address: 6004 Lake Worth Blvd, Lake Worth, TX 76135

company_info.headquarters: 6004 Lake Worth Blvd, Lake Worth, TX 76135

pros: 3,300+ locations across 29 U.S. states, D.C., UK, and Latin America provides extensive geographic accessibility
No credit check, income verification, or background check required for pawn loans—accessible to consumers with poor/no credit
Immediate cash funding on the spot with no application delays
Non-recourse loans mean borrower is not personally liable beyond losing the pledged item
Diversified service offerings including gold buying, layaway plans (10% down), and retail merchandise sales
Large institutional company (S&P MidCap 400, Russell 2000 index component) provides stability and regulatory compliance
Accepts wide variety of collateral items including jewelry, electronics, tools, instruments, and sporting goods
cons: Pawn loans carry high effective interest rates when annualized; repayment terms are short (typically 30-45 days based on industry standards not specified in site)
Loss of pledged personal property if unable to repay—borrower must value the item less than their need for immediate cash
Requires physical transport of items to store location; not available online or through remote services
Retail merchandise quality and selection is variable and dependent on inventory of used/pawned items
Limited transparency on the website regarding specific interest rates, fees, and loan terms
best_for: Consumers with poor credit or no credit history who need emergency cash quickly
Individuals with valuable items (jewelry, electronics, instruments) they're willing to pledge for short-term liquidity
People in rural or underserved areas seeking alternative lending outside traditional banking systems
Consumers seeking to liquidate gold, precious metals, or other valuables for immediate cash
diagnosis: FirstCash is best for cash-constrained consumers facing immediate, short-term liquidity needs who possess valuable items they're willing to pledge as collateral and lack access to traditional credit. The primary caveat is that pawn loans function fundamentally differently from conventional loans—the borrower risks losing their pledged property, making this appropriate only for items they can afford to lose if unable to repay within the specified term.
services: Pawn loans secured by personal property pledges
Gold and precious metal buying and immediate cash payment
Retail sales of merchandise including jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, and instruments
Layaway services with 10% down payment plans
Lease-to-own and retail finance payment solutions (through subsidiary AFF) at 15,000+ merchant partners
Store locator with 2,500+ locations across North and Latin America
Online inventory browsing and merchandise search
Non-recourse lending (borrower liability limited to pledged item)
Point-of-sale payment solutions for retail transactions
Pawn loan FAQs and educational resources
Item evaluation and on-the-spot cash appraisals
